_doc.purpose: Localization companion for nsfw_ContraceptiveMedication.json. Holds en-us entries added/updated after the source file's zh-cn text was authored, so the source file itself doesn't need to be touched again for translation-only changes.

en-us.chara_status_contraceptive_daily_tooltip: Pauses this character's cycle progress once it reaches the resting stage.
en-us.consumable_medicine_contraceptive_daily_: An oral contraceptive tablet taken daily. For as long as it remains active, it pauses the user's cycle progress.
